text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come for Mihono Bourbon
and I to take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My first objective in the Twinkle Series is to win
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I wish to continue gradually strengthening my
body in order to achieve this goal.
We're here to win the Triple Crown and prove that one can supplement stamina through hard work.
Our training begins today!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant, pant!

Some figures standing off in the distance are
watching Bourbon as she trains vigorously.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's Bourbon. She's going at it hard again
today.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? She runs six inclines every day. That
kind of workload is almost worrying...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...
choice_data_list: Just one more lap! You've got this!
Just one more lap! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your hard work today, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am merely following the training regimen you
provided.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Your efforts deserve more praise than mine.
choice_data_list: You're the one out there putting in the work.
You're the one out there putting in the work.

text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's training regimen is very strict
compared to that of other runners.

I doubt there are many who can do what she does
without complaint.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.
Her usually unemotional expression softens a bit.
choice_data_list:
We're going to take the Twinkle Series by
storm!

We're going to take the Twinkle Series by
storm!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Right!

The arduous training is certainly helping her
progress.
choice_data_list: (We've got to work hard tomorrow too!)

text_block_list.text:
Just as I'm heading to my office to further refine
Bourbon's training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Do you have a moment?
I'm stopped by a fellow trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure it's okay to put Mihono Bourbon
through such brutal stamina training?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: So you say, but...

He gives me a troubled look and scratches his
head.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She is very obedient—some might say oddly so.
I've heard rumors you're taking advantage of
that.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Plus, she's a sprinter no matter how you look at
her. Don't let her potential go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Really.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Triple Crown is a dream I originally
shared with my father. Now, my trainer is chasing
that dream with me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's meticulous training has allowed me to
reliably improve my cardiopulmonary functions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition to training for consistent completion
times of medium- and long-distance races...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I recently recorded a time of one minute and
thirty-five seconds in a 1,600-meter run. This is a
competitive time for junior year.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I surmise that these are the results brought about
by Trainer's belief in my strength.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, I currently have no problems with
my mental or physical health.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: In short, I am "okay."

Mihono Bourbon speaks this entire monologue in
nearly a single breath, leaving my trainer
colleague dumbfounded.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...Haha, I didn't expect a lecture from you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This was not a "lecture." I merely communicated
the facts.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...Right. Okay, I'm sorry. That was insensitive of
me.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I was just a bit worried because it seemed like you
were being forced to run beyond your breaking
point.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
But I can see you really trust your trainer. Stay
safe at the Twinkle Series, then. I'll be rooting for
you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you.
After saying his piece, the trainer leaves.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I do not understand the intention behind your
expression of gratitude. I merely corrected a
misunderstanding.
choice_data_list: I'm just happy to know that you trust me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I am not well-versed in such things.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, I have determined that your
instructions are essential for running in
long-distance races.
choice_data_list: That means you believe in me.
That means you believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see... So that's what it is.

And with that, Mihono Bourbon and I embark on
a long journey to chase after our dream!
